revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839643]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 4|qq=May 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genryaku|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Yasunori|Fujiwara Hosanori]] departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1572|1572]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihiro|Shimazu Yoshihiro]] defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1597|1597]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – [[:en:Ike no Taiga|Ike Taiga]], a painter from the Nan domain (died [[:en:1776|1776]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – [[:en:Saigō Jūdō|Saigō Jūdō]], a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died [[:en:1902|1902]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Tenbun]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1550|1550]] [[:en:May 20|May 20]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1511|1511]]). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|3|5|5|4|4|6|5|0504|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Genryaku|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Yasunori|Fujiwara Hosanori]] departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1572|1572]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihiro|Shimazu Yoshihiro]] defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1597|1597]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – [[:en:Ike no Taiga|Ike Taiga]], a painter from the Nan domain (died [[:en:1776|1776]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – [[:en:Saigō Jūdō|Saigō Jūdō]], a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died [[:en:1902|1902]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Tenbun]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1550|1550]] [[:en:May 20|May 20]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1511|1511]]). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初四]][[zh:五月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839643]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 4|qq=May 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genryaku|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Yasunori|Fujiwara Hosanori]] departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1572|1572]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihiro|Shimazu Yoshihiro]] defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1597|1597]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – [[:en:Ike no Taiga|Ike Taiga]], a painter from the Nan domain (died [[:en:1776|1776]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – [[:en:Saigō Jūdō|Saigō Jūdō]], a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died [[:en:1902|1902]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Tenbun]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1550|1550]] [[:en:May 20|May 20]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1511|1511]]). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Genryaku|Gangyō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:878|878]] [[:en:June 9|June 9]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Yasunori|Fujiwara Hosanori]] departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1572|1572]] [[:en:June 14|June 14]]) – [[:en:Shimazu Yoshihiro|Shimazu Yoshihiro]] defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1597|1597]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1723|1723]] [[:en:June 6|June 6]]) – [[:en:Ike no Taiga|Ike Taiga]], a painter from the Nan domain (died [[:en:1776|1776]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – [[:en:Saigō Jūdō|Saigō Jūdō]], a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died [[:en:1902|1902]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Tenbun]] 19th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1550|1550]] [[:en:May 20|May 20]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1511|1511]]). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|WD=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasunori|en|Fujiwara no Yasunori|WD=Q3076491|lt=Fujiwara Hosanori}} departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|WD=Q6670|lt=1572}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|WD=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|WD=Q2661041|lt=Ike Taiga}}, a painter from the Nan domain (died {{ill|1776|en|1776|WD=Q7703|lt=1776}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1}}) – {{ill|Saigō Jūdō|en|Saigō Jūdō|WD=Q699674|lt=Saigō Jūdō}}, a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Tenbun}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|WD=Q2579|lt=May 20}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}}). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|3|5|5|4|4|6|5|0504|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|WD=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasunori|en|Fujiwara no Yasunori|WD=Q3076491|lt=Fujiwara Hosanori}} departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|WD=Q6670|lt=1572}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|WD=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|WD=Q2661041|lt=Ike Taiga}}, a painter from the Nan domain (died {{ill|1776|en|1776|WD=Q7703|lt=1776}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1}}) – {{ill|Saigō Jūdō|en|Saigō Jūdō|WD=Q699674|lt=Saigō Jūdō}}, a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Tenbun}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|WD=Q2579|lt=May 20}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}}). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|WD=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasunori|en|Fujiwara no Yasunori|WD=Q3076491|lt=Fujiwara Hosanori}} departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|WD=Q6670|lt=1572}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|WD=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|WD=Q2661041|lt=Ike Taiga}}, a painter from the Nan domain (died {{ill|1776|en|1776|WD=Q7703|lt=1776}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1}}) – {{ill|Saigō Jūdō|en|Saigō Jūdō|WD=Q699674|lt=Saigō Jūdō}}, a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Tenbun}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|WD=Q2579|lt=May 20}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}}). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|3|5|5|4|4|6|5|0504|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|WD=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō|1=Genryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|WD=Q23910|lt=878|1=878}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasunori|en|Fujiwara no Yasunori|WD=Q3076491|lt=Fujiwara Hosanori|1=Fujiwara no Yasunori}} departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|WD=Q6670|lt=1572|1=1572}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|WD=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|WD=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro|1=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|WD=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18|1=June 18}}) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|WD=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|WD=Q2661041|lt=Ike Taiga|1=Ike no Taiga}}, a painter from the Nan domain (died {{ill|1776|en|1776|WD=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – {{ill|Saigō Jūdō|en|Saigō Jūdō|WD=Q699674|lt=Saigō Jūdō|1=Saigō Jūdō}}, a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Tenbun|1=Bun'ei}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550|1=1550}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|WD=Q2579|lt=May 20|1=May 20}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu|1=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}}). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō|1=Genryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|878|en|878|qid=Q23910|lt=878|1=878}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|qid=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasunori|en|Fujiwara no Yasunori|qid=Q3076491|lt=Fujiwara Hosanori|1=Fujiwara no Yasunori}} departed for the pacification of Mutsu in Ezo.<ref>{{Cite web|title=【Citation needed】|url=|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|qid=Q6670|lt=1572|1=1572}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|qid=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|qid=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro|1=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} defeated 3,000 soldiers of the 【Itō army|伊東軍】 with only 300 men at Shinmakai-in during the 【Battle of Kizakihara|木崎原の戦い】. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|qid=Q2670|lt=June 18|1=June 18}}) – The Tenshu of Fushimi Castle was completed; subsequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his son Hideyori relocated there. == Births == * <“[[Otomo Yoshinobu]]” has a note stating “January 3”.> * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|qid=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|qid=Q2661041|lt=Ike Taiga|1=Ike no Taiga}}, a painter from the Nan domain (died {{ill|1776|en|1776|qid=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – {{ill|Saigō Jūdō|en|Saigō Jūdō|qid=Q699674|lt=Saigō Jūdō|1=Saigō Jūdō}}, a military figure and the younger brother of Saigō Takamori (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Tenbun|1=Bun'ei}} 19th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1550|en|1550|qid=Q6557|lt=1550|1=1550}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|qid=Q2579|lt=May 20|1=May 20}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|qid=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu|1=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th Shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}}). == Commemorations == * 【Yukkanihee】 (沖縄県) – In various regions, the “Haarī” is performed. Historically, children were gifted toys to wish for their growth. “Yukkanihee” means “the day of the fourth” in the lunisolar calendar.<ref>{{Cite web|title=旧暦行事カレンダー Lunisolar April～6月|url=http://www.okinawastory.jp/contents/kurashi/calendar4_6|publisher=沖縄観光情報WEBサイト おきなわ物語|accessdate=2018-06-24|qq=}}</ref> * 【Naha Haarī】 * 【Itoman Haarī】
